'''''Lightning''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 transport]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

When [[General/Legends|General]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] and several [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] technicians planned to end [[Operation Strike Fear]] by destroying its command ship, the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']], ''Lightning'' was dispatched to [[Capture of Cygnus Staff|capture]] some technicians from [[Cygnus Spaceworks/Legends|Cygnus Corp]] during a test of their new spacecraft, the [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|''Alpha''-class Xg-1 Star Wing]].

[[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and [[Sunnar Jan-lo]] identified the transport carrying the Cygnus staff and then fought off [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE series/Legends|fighters]] while the ''Lightning'' conducted a boarding operation.

Later the Cygnus techs were 'convinced' to aid the Alliance in destroying the ''Invincible'' by modifying a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] to plant a stolen warhead on the Star Destroyer.

''Lightning'' also assisted in the capture of Imperial Overlord [[Ghorin]]'s Y-wings during [[Operation Grain Snatch]].

{{Ship-stub}}
